category_sources: Official MediaInfo README describes unified display of technical and tag data for video and audio files.
source_facts.description says it displays technical and tag data for audio/video.
display_name_sources: Official MediaArea project branding uses MediaInfo.

Official MediaArea FAQ covers MediaInfo CLI and usage/support topics.

tags_sources: Official MediaInfo README confirms video and audio metadata display.
